chapter_title: Albuminoidal substances; modified starches; glues; enzymes
inclusions: Heading 35.01 — Casein, caseinates and other casein derivatives; casein glues

Heading 35.02 — Albumins (including concentrates of two or more whey proteins, containing by weight more than 80% whey proteins, calculated on the dry matter), albuminates and other albumin derivatives — includes: ovalbumin, lactalbumin, blood albumin (for non-therapeutic/non-prophylactic use)

Heading 35.03 — Gelatin (including gelatin in rectangular/square sheets, whether or not surface-worked or coloured) and gelatin derivatives; isinglass; other glues of animal origin, excluding casein glues of heading 35.01
Heading 35.04 — Peptones and their derivatives; other protein substances and their derivatives, not elsewhere specified or included; hide powder, whether or not chromed
Heading 35.05 — Dextrins and other modified starches (e.g., pregelatinised or esterified starches); glues based on starches or dextrins or on other modified starches

Heading 35.06 — Prepared glues and other prepared adhesives, not elsewhere specified or included; products suitable for use as glues or adhesives, put up for retail sale as glues or adhesives, not exceeding a net weight of 1 kg
Heading 35.07 — Enzymes; prepared enzymes, not elsewhere specified or included

exclusions.condition: Blood albumin prepared for therapeutic or prophylactic uses
Casein, albumins, gelatin etc. used as food or food ingredients in retail form
exclusions.action: May redirect to food chapters — e.g., food-grade casein preparations → 19.01 or 21.06; edible gelatin for retail → 35.03 stays if not further prepared; pre-packaged food forms may go to relevant food chapter
Stay in heading 11.08 (Chapter 11). Only MODIFIED starches (pregelatinised, esterified, crosslinked, dextrins) go to 35.05

exclusions.condition: Adhesives with more than 1 kg net weight put up for retail, or industrial adhesives not for retail sale
exclusions.action: Heading 35.06 retail limit is 1 kg net. Larger industrial packs of specific adhesive types may go to their base material chapter (e.g., epoxy adhesive system → 39.07 or 38.24)

classification_rules.rule: Key boundary: 35.02 vs 30.02 — blood albumin for pharmaceutical vs industrial use
classification_rules.description: Blood albumin (serum albumin) split: prepared for THERAPEUTIC or PROPHYLACTIC uses → 30.02. NOT prepared for therapeutic/prophylactic use (industrial, food, laboratory) → 35.02. The intended preparation and use determines classification.

classification_rules.rule: Key boundary: 35.05 vs 11.08 — modified vs natural starches
classification_rules.description: Natural/unmodified starches → 11.08 (maize starch, wheat starch, potato starch, tapioca, etc.). Chemically or physically modified starches → 35.05: dextrins, pregelatinised starch, esterified starch, etherified starch, cross-linked starch. The modification is the trigger.

Enzymes (whether or not chemically defined) are specifically captured by heading 35.07 and excluded from Chapter 29 by Ch.29 Note 2(h). This applies to: proteases, lipases, amylases, cellulases, lactases, rennet, pepsin, etc. Prepared enzyme preparations (immobilized enzymes, enzyme cocktails) also go to 35.07.
